items.line_en: Hello, I'm Francis Roberts, the Accounts Manager.

coach.say: Hello, I'm Francis Roberts, the Accounts Manager.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / I'm Francis Roberts, / the Accounts Manager.

items.line_en: What can I do for you?

coach.say: What can I do for you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What can I do for you?

items.line_en: Hi, my name is Mark Johnson. This is my wife Lynn.

coach.say: Hi, my name is Mark Johnson. This is my wife Lynn.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, / my name is Mark Johnson. / This is my wife Lynn.

items.line_en: We've just moved into town and would like some information about opening a bank account.

coach.say: We've just moved into town and would like some information about opening a bank account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We've just moved into town and / would like some information about opening a bank account.

items.line_en: What kind of account would you like to open?

coach.say: What kind of account would you like to open?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What kind of account would you like to open?

items.line_en: We want to open a checking account.

coach.say: We want to open a checking account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We want to open a checking account.

items.line_en: How much would you like to deposit today?

coach.say: How much would you like to deposit today?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How much would you like to deposit today?

items.line_en: I have $500 in cash as well as a payroll check for $800.

coach.say: I have $500 in cash as well as a payroll check for $800.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have $500 in cash as well as a payroll check for $800.

items.line_en: Okay, I'll get you the application forms to fill out.

coach.say: Okay, I'll get you the application forms to fill out.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / I'll get you the application forms to fill out.

items.line_en: You'll receive your new bank cards in about two weeks.

coach.say: You'll receive your new bank cards in about two weeks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You'll receive your new bank cards in about two weeks.

items.line_en: Once you have chosen your PIN, you'll be able to use the bank machine for deposits, withdrawals, bank transfers, and bill payments.

coach.say: Once you have chosen your PIN, you'll be able to use the bank machine for deposits, withdrawals, bank transfers, and bill payments.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Once you have chosen your PIN, you'll be able to use the bank machine for deposits, / withdrawals, bank transfers, and bill payments.

items.line_en: Is there a service fee for this type of account?

coach.say: Is there a service fee for this type of account?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Is there a service fee for this type of account?

items.line_en: There is no fee for a regular checking account.

coach.say: There is no fee for a regular checking account.
coach.hint: Chunk it: There is no fee for a regular checking account.

items.line_en: However, for a small fee of $7 a month, we offer 200 personalized checks, full online banking services, and a $500 overdraft protection plan.

coach.say: However, for a small fee of $7 a month, we offer 200 personalized checks, full online banking services, and a $500 overdraft protection plan.
coach.hint: Chunk it: However, for a small fee of $7 a month, / we offer 200 personalized checks, full online banking services, and a $500 overdraft protection plan.

items.line_en: Would you be interested in that service?

coach.say: Would you be interested in that service?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Would you be interested in that service?

items.line_en: Yes, that sounds good. We'll take it. Do you have a 24-hour ATM?

coach.say: Yes, that sounds good. We'll take it. Do you have a 24-hour ATM?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / that sounds good. / We'll take it. / Do you have a 24-hour ATM?

items.line_en: Yes, of course. We also have a 24-hour drive-through service at the side of the building.

coach.say: Yes, of course. We also have a 24-hour drive-through service at the side of the building.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / of course. / We also have a 24-hour drive-through service at the side of the building.

items.line_en: When do you send out the monthly statements?

coach.say: When do you send out the monthly statements?
coach.hint: Chunk it: When do you send out the monthly statements?

items.line_en: On the 5th of every month, I'll take your forms now.

coach.say: On the 5th of every month, I'll take your forms now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: On the 5th of every month, / I'll take your forms now.

items.line_en: You can endorse your check and go over to the teller.

coach.say: You can endorse your check and go over to the teller.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You can endorse your check and / go over to the teller.

items.line_en: She'll handle your deposit for you.

coach.say: She'll handle your deposit for you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: She'll handle your deposit for you.

items.line_en: Thank you very much. You've been very helpful.

coach.say: Thank you very much. You've been very helpful.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you very much. / You've been very helpful.

items.line_en: You're quite welcome. Hope to see you again soon.

coach.say: You're quite welcome. Hope to see you again soon.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You're quite welcome. / Hope to see you again soon.

items.line_en: Thank you.

coach.say: Thank you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you.
